runners.formComment: Recorded a 6 length win (19.40) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Has three successes and four minors from 10 starts from box 1. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

runners.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (23.33) over 401m at Richmond. Has a low draw. Others preferred.

runners.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn behind Reggae Ethics beaten 16 lengths (21.10). Should be right in the finish.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 350m at Goulburn behind Reggae Ethics beaten 16 lengths (21.10). Should be right in the finish.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame last time at Maitland but the start prior was an impressive winner scoring by 1.75 lengths in a Grade 4 at Richmond Straight and clocking a brilliant 17.36 for the 324m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.
